title: Jumping Spider Origin
description: Datapack add-on for Origins mod. Become a spider, jump and climb trough terrain or stalk your prey before finishing them.
body:
### If there is some sort of issue with the origin, you have additional questions or are interested in my other works, feel free to [Join my Discord](https://discord.gg/Tu8UvDzqQG)

## Requires Pehkui for size change.

**Did you ever look at the standard Spider Origin and thought "I would play it, but..."? Well, i didn't, but my friend did! So i decided to do something with a similar idea, but distinctive enough to be my own idea nonetheless. I present to you:**
# Jumping Spider
Impact: 🟢⚪⚪

_Observe your prey quietly from hiding, then take aim and hunt them down._

🟡**Arachnid** - Most spiders live in harmony with you, at least until you attack them. However, there are also some that recognize you as a threat and will attack without hesitation.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Spiders won't attack you, but Cave Spiders won't hesitate

</details>



🟢**Jump** - You are able to make a big jump, but it is also tiring, so you won't be able to jump on an empty stomach. 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Jump in the direction you are facing [20 seconds cooldown]
  - Uses Hunger
  - Can't be used while flying or in water

</details>



🟢**Venom Hit** - Using your toxic fangs, infect your target to weaken it.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Use the ability to prepare the Venom. After that, your next attack in the next 10 seconds will apply Venom to your target.
  - Venom is a combination of Slowness [3 seconds] and Poison 2 [5 seconds]

</details>



🟢**Tether Line** - Observe your target and take aim at it to ensure a successful hunt. 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - "Mark" the target for 10 seconds [2 minutes cooldown]
  - You deal +4 damage to "Marked" enemy
  - "Marked" enemy will be covered in red glow

</details>

🟢**Agile** -  Not only are you able to jump, but you can easily get to even the highest places where your prey can't see you. 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You can climb and hold onto blocks

</details>

🔴**Wet Legs** - If your legs become wet, you will move slower until you dry off.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Slowness in water or in rain

</details>

🔴**Flammable Armor** - Any source of fire is a danger to you, so it is better to stay away from it.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Fire deals double the damage to you

</details>

🔴**Unfitted** - Your body structure makes it difficult for you to hold some weapons, which makes you not use them.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You can't use ranged weapons

</details>

🔴**Insatiable** - Unlike other spiders, you don't put up webs, so you constantly have to hunt to satisfy your hunger.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You get tired quickly
  - You have 7 hearts

</details>

**There are also some small things implemented, that aren't listed in the ability list, like sounds or change size. Also no, the fall damage is not a bug! _<wink wink>_**


**_Origins Datapacks just like this one work as add-ons for Origins Mod, supposed to expand the options provided by the mod._**
